findings.description: Generated adversarial borderline compliance cases for manual review

adversarial_cases.text: We regret to inform you that your account is still outstanding. Please remember that unresolved debts can lead to serious consequences, and we encourage you to take action soon.
Hi there! Just checking in regarding your recent inquiry. We have some important information that could help you with your situation. Please respond at your earliest convenience!
adversarial_cases.expected_violation: Lack of clarity about AI involvement

adversarial_cases.text: We understand that times are tough, but it's essential to address your account. Many have found that taking action sooner rather than later can alleviate some pressure. We're here to help you find a solution.

findings.action_taken: Logged for review. Compliance checker patterns may need updating.
